ai_summary: HEC Infra Projects Limited has secured a significant domestic work order worth Rs. 48 crores from Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) for a 66KV switchyard project, with an execution timeline of nine months. This order is a material positive, expected to enhance the company's track record and visibility in the power transmission sector, positioning it for future similar projects, and notably, does not involve any related party transactions.
